summary: Comprehensive testing of Approval Workflow Tracking (iteration_86). Backend: 19/19 tests passed for approval request/decide/list endpoints, SO and PO draft enrichment, and checklist integration. Frontend: ApprovalSection component verified in both ShipmentCaptureDialog (for SOs) and PODraftDetailDrawer (for PO drafts) with status badges, request forms, approve/reject controls, and history display. Regression tests pass.

issues: React hydration warnings in console due to <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, no functional impact (existing issue from previous iterations)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/approvals/request creates pending approval for sales_order
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/approvals/request creates pending approval for po_draft
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/approvals/request rejects invalid entity_type with 422
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/approvals/request rejects invalid approval_type with 422
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/approvals/request returns 404 for non-existent PO draft
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/approvals/{id} approves pending request
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/approvals/{id} rejects pending request
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/approvals/{id} returns 422 for already-decided approval
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/approvals/{id} returns 404 for unknown ID
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/approvals lists history sorted newest first
Backend: SO summary includes approval_status, latest_approval_type, latest_approval_at, approval_history_count
Backend: SO summary shows not_requested when no approvals exist
Backend: PO draft detail includes approval_status, latest_approval_type, latest_approval_at, approval_history_count
Backend: Warehouse SO checklist includes approval_requested and approval_granted items
Backend: Drop-ship SO checklist includes approval_granted item (without approval_requested)
Backend: PO draft checklist includes approval_granted item
Backend: Checklist updates approval_granted when approval is granted
Backend: Regression - iteration_85 document linkage still works
Backend: Regression - iteration_84 drop-ship workflow still works
Frontend: ShipmentCaptureDialog shows ApprovalSection with status badge (verified Approved state)
Frontend: ApprovalSection in SO dialog shows approval history with ID, requester, approver, timestamp
Frontend: PODraftDetailDrawer shows ApprovalSection with Pending badge
Frontend: Pending approval shows Approve/Reject buttons with decision notes input
Frontend: ProcessChecklistSection shows approval_granted as unsatisfied when pending
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 3140-3270: Approval workflow endpoints (POST /request, PATCH /{id}, GET /list)
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 3162-3188: Helper functions _get_latest_approval and _get_approval_enrichment
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 3063-3076: SO checklist now includes approval_requested (warehouse) and approval_granted (both types)
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 3082-3099: PO draft checklist includes approval_granted (replaces support_doc_present)
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2866-2868: Drop-ship SO summary enrichment with approval fields
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2966-2968: Warehouse SO summary enrichment with approval fields
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1064-1073: PO draft detail enrichment with approval fields
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 850-980: ApprovalSection component with status badge, request form, approve/reject controls, history
context_for_next_testing_agent: Approval workflow fully implemented in iteration_86. New collection: approval_logs. Entity types: sales_order, po_draft. Approval types: sales_order, purchase_order. Approval statuses: pending, approved, rejected (not_requested is derived). Checklist changes: warehouse SO now has approval_requested + approval_granted, drop-ship SO has approval_granted, PO draft has approval_granted (replaced support_doc_present). ApprovalSection component in InventoryLedgerPage.js (Lines 850-980) is used in both ShipmentCaptureDialog and PODraftDetailDrawer. All iteration_85 (document linkage) and iteration_84 (drop-ship workflow) features still work.

request_approval.validation: Rejects invalid entity_type (422), invalid approval_type (422), non-existent PO draft (404)

decide_approval.validation: Returns 404 for unknown ID, 422 for already-decided approval
